description: Round toed, green shoes which have central lace fastening with metal eyelets and waxed cotton lace Synthetic upper with leather overlay on the toe box, reinforced overlay at the heel collar Padded inner and footbed and embossed branding on a leather patch on the tongue Eva midsole with detail stitched attached to the upper and foxing Rubber signature waffle outsole with scooped out diamond shaped grooves that create a distinct tread pattern
